$comment: Style-token registry for SDUI variant primitives. Each entry describes intent, per-platform per-OS-tier realization, and an override matrix indicating which inline props may override the variant's defaults. Every tier declares a light and dark spec. Clients read the appropriate tier at render time based on OS version or capability detection; the server reads the override matrix when migrating inline-property bags to variant references. Phase 6 adds an optional formFactorNotes dimension: when present it documents how the variant realization adjusts for non-phone form factors. A missing formFactor row means the phone realization is the default.

hero.description: Prominent featured-content surface. Layered shadow, platform material on capable tiers, adaptive background for dark mode.
hero.intent: Celebratory surface that elevates featured content above baseline cards.

26+.light: Liquid Glass effect + 2-layer shadow (radius 6 y 3, radius 12 y 6) + spring press animation; 16pt corner radius
26+.dark: Liquid Glass effect (dark tint) + same layered shadow; corner radius 16pt

17-25.light: .ultraThinMaterial + gradient overlay top-to-bottom (accent 10% -> accent 0%) + spring press; 16pt corner; shadow black@0.12 radius 6 y 3
17-25.dark: .ultraThinMaterial (dark) + gradient overlay accent 20% -> accent 0%; shadow black@0.35 radius 8 y 4

<17.light: Solid Color(.secondarySystemGroupedBackground) + gradient overlay accent 10% -> accent 0% + shadow black@0.12 radius 6 y 3; 16pt corner
<17.dark: Solid Color(.secondarySystemGroupedBackground) (auto-adapts) + gradient overlay accent 20% -> accent 0% + shadow black@0.35 radius 8 y 4

15+.light: Material 3 Expressive Surface + tonalElevation 6dp + expressive shape (RoundedCornerShape(16.dp)) + ripple; shadow elevation 8dp
15+.dark: Same; MaterialTheme.colorScheme.surfaceContainer automatically shifts for dark theme

12-14.light: Material You Surface + tonalElevation 6dp + RoundedCornerShape(16.dp) + ripple; shadow elevation 8dp
12-14.dark: Same; dynamic color theme handles dark adaptation

<12.light: Flat Material Surface + shadow elevation 6dp + RoundedCornerShape(16.dp) + ripple
<12.dark: Same; static Material3 dark color scheme

modern.light: Background: linear-gradient(180deg, var(--surface-raised-top), var(--surface-raised-bottom)); backdrop-filter: blur(20px) saturate(140%); border-radius: 16px; box-shadow: var(--shadow-lg); transition: transform 150ms ease-out on :active
modern.dark: Same tokens; --surface-raised-* resolves dark via prefers-color-scheme

fallback.light: Background: var(--surface-raised); border-radius: 16px; box-shadow: var(--shadow-lg); no backdrop-filter
fallback.dark: Same; custom properties carry dark values

evidence.iosRefApp: No true hero composite; extrapolated from RefAppComponents.swift L52-69 gradient badge pattern + GameCardView shadow/radius
evidence.androidRefApp: No clear hero; derived from Material 3 conventions

formFactorNotes.tablet: Increased horizontal padding (24dp/pt vs 16dp/pt), increased shadow elevation (12dp vs 8dp), same 16pt corner radius
formFactorNotes.web.wide: Same as tablet realization; wider content area with max-width constraint

grouped.description: Inset grouped list chrome. Row backgrounds align, interior dividers inset to separator origin.
grouped.intent: iOS-style inset grouped list, or the Android visual equivalent (bordered column with interior dividers).

26+.light: SwiftUI .listStyle(.insetGrouped) on List; otherwise hand-rolled: Color(.secondarySystemGroupedBackground) + cornerRadius 12pt + interior Divider().padding(.leading, content-aligned inset)

17-25.light: .listStyle(.insetGrouped) or hand-rolled with Color(.secondarySystemGroupedBackground) + 12pt radius + interior divider

15+.light: Column with Modifier.border(1.dp, MaterialTheme.colorScheme.outlineVariant, RoundedCornerShape(16.dp)) + padding 16.dp + interior HorizontalDivider between rows
15+.dark: Same; dynamic color handles outline/border color

<12.light: Column with 1dp border + 16dp corner + HorizontalDivider; static colors

modern.light: background: var(--surface-raised); border-radius: 12px; interior `hr` elements with margin-left matching row content inset

evidence.iosRefApp: SettingsView L18-23, ProfileView L18-23, StreamsListView L62-78, VideoConfigSheet L20-25 (.listStyle(.insetGrouped)); VODPlaylistView L23-48 (hand-rolled block: secondarySystemGroupedBackground + 12pt + divider inset 104pt aligned to thumbnail)
evidence.androidRefApp: StreamInfoScreen.kt L290-349 (Modifier.border(1.dp, ..., RoundedCornerShape(16.dp)) + padding 16.dp + interior HorizontalDivider)

formFactorNotes.tablet: Increased horizontal padding (24dp/pt vs 16dp/pt), same 12/16pt corner radius and border
formFactorNotes.web.wide: Single realization — no form-factor adjustment needed

thumbnail.description: Smaller content artwork. Fixed dimensions, cover fit, small corner radius.
thumbnail.intent: List-row thumbnail for VOD cards, content rails, compact cells.

modern.light: border-radius: 8px; object-fit: cover; caller supplies width/height

evidence.androidRefApp: Not found; derived from Compose conventions

formFactorNotes.web.wide: Single realization — CSS responsive sizing, no form-factor adjustment

variant_override_blocked.description: Emitted when an inline prop attempts to override an axis the variant's override matrix marks as locked for the current platform. Variant default wins; inline value is ignored.

variant_resolver_missing.description: Emitted when the wire variant string doesn't match any known value in the primitive's enum. Renderer falls through to the primitive default.
